parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ locationId: "SsBG7j5KQAIP1SFP2Sca", pipelineId: "x0cxXOkKwqAWVvcPdKZQ", pipelineStageId: "79ab10fd-5294-4330-b4ac-91b2df7c7d3a", contactId: $('Get Contact (Entry)').first().json.contact.id, name: ($('Get Contact (Entry)').first().json.contact.name||"S4.6 Lead"), status: "open" }) }}

nodes.name: Opp Ready: Update Opportunity to Stage 6 Appointmen
Send Email: Send Email #3 Commitment test

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ type:'Email', contactId: $('Get Contact (Entry)').first().json.contact.id, subject: "About our call tomorrow…", html: " About our call tomorrow…
This session only works if you follow the rules — here’s your chance to bow out if you won’t.
Reece Home Protection
Final Reminder

About our call tomorrow…

This session only works if you follow the rules.

Hi {{contact.first_name}},

Just a quick reminder — your Review Session is tomorrow. We’ll walk through:
• your Protection Grade & classification status
• your most likely failure point
• whether your insurer sees you as protected or vulnerable

Here are the rules again:

1. Show up on time

2. Be in a quiet place

3. Be ready to hear the truth

4. Keep an open mind

Now here’s the commitment test:

If you’re not prepared to follow these rules, tell me now so I can give your spot to someone else.

This session protects you. But only if you show up ready.

Talk tomorrow,

{{custom_values.rep_name}}
Protecting families for over 50 years
{{location.city}}, FL
Unsubscribe • © {{right_now.year}} {{location.name}}
", from: "randy@getreecewindows.com", fromName: "Randy Reece" }) }}

I\u2019ll call you at that time. Reply if you need to reschedule.", fromNumber: "+19542808890" }) }}

nodes.name: Send Email: Send Email #4 Morning-of reminder

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ type:'Email', contactId: $('Get Contact (Entry)').first().json.contact.id, subject: "Quick reminder for today’s call…", html: " Quick reminder for today’s call…
Today you finally see how your insurer actually classifies your home.
Reece Home Protection
Reminder

Quick reminder for today’s call…

Today you finally see how your insurer actually classifies your home.

Hi {{contact.first_name}},

Your Review Session is today:

👉 {{appointment_date_and_time}}

Looking forward to speaking with you.

Talk soon,

{{custom_values.rep_name}}

PS: Risk Report link if you want to refresh:

View My Risk Report
Protecting families for over 50 years

", from: "randy@getreecewindows.com", fromName: "Randy Reece" }) }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ type:'SMS', contactId: $('Get Contact (Entry)').first().json.contact.id, message: "{{contact.first_name}}, quick reminder - your Review Session starts in 15 minutes. I\u2019ll call you shortly.", fromNumber: "+19542808890" }) }}

parameters.content:
## S4.6 Review Session Prep
Translated from GHL workflow fc8a2dd2-caa7-432a-9aae-2a64dd19fa80.
GHL triggers: customer_appointment:Customer Booked Review Session; inbound_webhook:Inbound Agentic Trigger

Entry is a webhook (orchestrator-driven). Credentials by ID only; brand law applied to email senders (Randy Reece). See workflow node notes for [STUB] items.
Flags: 2 | Stubs: 1 | Brand-law: 0
